textByHash.fe8a3653d9052bf4f92f1a05b63f91914015b25a: You're not a real guard. I've been in here long enough to know that. What's your business?
textByHash.0a7dfc68ae435838a41e2816f9b3a068b39b52bc: I've seen them in here, although they don't look up to much. My advice to you is to leave before you end up in a cell too.
textByHash.ea4ba288ea8d95f7bf0918be2fc5deb4c2f48f85: So Khazard got his hands on you too?
textByHash.aab2b41fe5cb6ad6f0e10cc8374751d47e6f5b2a: If you're lucky you may last as long as me.
textByHash.21174943403a345bb0ccfefc0eea25cfef5daa9f: I've been in Khazard's prisons ever since I can remember. I was a child when his men kidnapped me. My whole life has been spent killing and fighting, all in the hope that one day I might escape.
textByHash.03ca41529b71b837487e4a7b9066b49a60f1ea8e: Wait.. sshh, the guard is coming. Looks like you'll be going into the arena. Good luck friend.
textByHash.76af9681cef61194a400b9ee0406bdb2de04aac1: I don't know how you managed to escape the arena, but you may not be as lucky next time. Get out of here while you can.
textByHash.b1381630ae5ff11afbdee67a5088c2fbaf388029: Hmm... You don't seem like a real guard to me. Who are you?
textByHash.ed785d11a125fd11db145844d4fcc1cc53c64573: I've seen them in here, but my advice to you is to leave them. Whatever plan you have will only end with you in a cell as well.
textByHash.9f42063df85ccafdf6f63b6eff6228fb5e38677c: You're not a guard. What are you doing in here?
textByHash.0b2467c38cba05fc65bcca5b3ccd1104e933ae04: Hello there. So Khazard got his hands on you too?
textByHash.598fb591a75169853c4c765dd4d663b1110f4abf: Well if you're lucky, you might last as long as me.
textByHash.cfca1b8fe11e3554dd1e4e05dd5750107db9334a: As long as I can remember. I was a child when his men kidnapped me. My whole life has been spent killing and fighting, all in the hope that one day I might escape.
textByHash.aa2e8942bf1dc2ca0945c87243e87df3efbd0b80: Wait... sounds like the guard is coming. Looks like you'll be going back into the arena. Good luck, friend.
textByHash.cb2e959a0f88bf5111cccc4503ca5acf980b38d2: I don't know how you managed to escape, but you may not be as lucky next time. Get out of here while you can.
